channel.title: Applied Craft
channel.description: Opinionated analysis of how AI changes the way products are built, decisions are made, and value is created.

item.title: The AI Judgment Trap: Why Getting Better at AI Is Making You Worse at Product
item.description: AI won't take your PM job. But it might prevent you from ever learning to do it well.

item.title: Your AI Quality Problem Isn't Specifications. It's Taste.
item.description: Most AI quality advice sells you the floor and calls it the ceiling.

item.title: Everyone Says Human Skills Will Matter. They're Right About One of Them.
item.description: The AI-proof skills list everyone cites is six items long. Five of them are wrong.

item.title: Your PM Job Is Six Jobs. You're Offloading the Wrong Half.
item.description: The mechanical half of every PM skill is now free. The judgment half is now exposed.

item.title: The PM Skills Map, Redrawn for AI
item.description: The four senses haven't changed. What counts within each one has.

item.title: You're Not Leveraging AI. You're Leveraging a Fast Typewriter.
item.description: And the distinction matters far more than you think.
